goals: Verify that the admin index details endpoint returns the correct index information and metadata for all expected entities
activities: Send a GET request to the admin index details endpoint with admin headers
Verify the response data contains a metadata property
Verify the metadata array contains exactly seven items
Iterate through the list of expected entities
Find the metadata for each expected entity in the response
Verify the entity metadata is defined
Verify the entity metadata matches the expected object structure
Verify the entity metadata contains a last synced key property
Find the metadata specifically for the Product entity
